executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is a Vercel serverless backend. The main API endpoint is /api/gemini (POST). All requests require a valid Supabase JWT Bearer token in the Authorization header. Test authentication, rate limiting, CORS, all action types (explain, generate-chapter, generate-mindmap, generate-question, generate-flashcards, generate-quiz, doubt, send-notification), and input validation. Use port 3000.
